item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
Ad-hoc signed build. Replaces v1.0.1 (which was Apple-Development signed and tripped macOS Gatekeeper's strict path).

From v1.0.2 onward Sparkle auto-updates apply transparently — payload trust is via the EdDSA signature, not the cert chain.

First-time install on a new Mac still requires right-click → Open or xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
First Sparkle-powered release. Establishes the auto-update channel.

Highlights since v1.0:

  • Native macOS app — NavigationSplitView sidebar, menu bar Commands, multi-window article reading.
  • Notification taps deep-link into the matching article.
  • Right-click context menus and Cmd-F search on Articles.
  • Editor: in-web Sparkle-style toolbar hidden; custom SwiftUI toolbar only.
  • Article body scrolls smoothly on macOS (two-finger trackpad).
  • Sparkle auto-update — this release establishes the channel.
